case_title: SPENCER MICHAEL D. VS SANDARA GORDON DBA SUNDARA INDUSTRIES LTD.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,806.40 FILED BY SPENCER MICHAEL D. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDARA GORDON DBA SUNDARA INDUSTRIES LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
